reviews.review_description:
Poor development! This seems  like a great concept, but there is no way to access the game without  creating a login. Only problem is you can't make one. I tried going to their main site to make one and it won't let you. 

Why have a game on the meta app store that can't be accessed? Lame.
And I am not alone .  Other have the same problem

Maya Lingo is not an app for the casual language learner. Rather, it's for those who need to apply their linguist skills on their job. It has endless professionally-developed content, hundreds of online peer linguists that you can connect with within your profession, and novice-to-expert lessons tailored to your job/MOS. It's not simply an app - it's a door to a new immersive digital learning infrastructure that empowers linguists to self-service their own professional language learning goals.
